languages.text: "Оцениваю этот выход из сложившейся ситуации, как {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117Traitor}наиболее рациональный{/d}". {n}Окуляры Экзальта-117 остаются неподвижными, а аугментированное лицо не выражает ничего.{/n} "Субъекту "Ювенна фон Валанциус" присвоен высший статус".
languages.translation_comment:
Спикер: Экзальт
НЕ играет DL_Exalt117ArrestedOrDead и играет DL_ExaltPersuaded или DL_TraitorExalt

traits.locale_text: Экзальт говорит, что по его расчетам это лучший выход для Себериана.

languages.translation_comment:
Спикер: Экзальт
НЕ играет DL_Exalt117ArrestedOrDead и играет DL_ExaltPersuaded или DL_TraitorExalt

languages.text: "I assess this route out of this situation as {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117Traitor}the most rational{/d}." {n}Exalt-117's ocular lenses remain fixed, and his augmented face expresses nothing.{/n} "Subject Juvenna von Valancius has been assigned the highest status."
languages.original_text: "Оцениваю этот выход из сложившейся ситуации, как {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117Traitor}наиболее рациональный{/d}". {n}Окуляры Экзальта-117 остаются неподвижными, а аугментированное лицо не выражает ничего.{/n} "Субъекту "Ювенна фон Валанциус" присвоен высший статус".

languages.text: “经评估，此路径为当前局势下{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117Traitor}最为理性的{/d}选择。”{n}尊使-117的光学镜片毫无波动，他那历经改造的面孔毫无表情。{/n}“对象：尤文娜·冯·瓦兰修斯——地位已上调至最高。”
languages.original_text: "I assess this route out of this situation as {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117Traitor}the most rational{/d}." {n}Exalt-117's ocular lenses remain fixed, and his augmented face expresses nothing.{/n} "Subject Juvenna von Valancius has been assigned the highest status."

traits.locale_text: “经评估，此路径为当前局势下{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117Traitor}最为理性的{/d}选择。”{n}尊使-117的光学镜片毫无波动，他那历经改造的面孔毫无表情。{/n}“对象：尤文娜·冯·瓦兰修斯——地位已上调至最高。”

languages.text: « Selon moi, cette issue à la situation est {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117Traitor}la plus rationnelle{/d} de toutes. » {n}Les lentilles oculaires d'Exalt-117 restent fixes, et son visage augmenté ne laisse transparaître aucun sentiment.{/n} « Le sujet Juvenna von Valancius se voit assigner le plus haut statut. »
languages.original_text: "I assess this route out of this situation as {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117Traitor}the most rational{/d}." {n}Exalt-117's ocular lenses remain fixed, and his augmented face expresses nothing.{/n} "Subject Juvenna von Valancius has been assigned the highest status."

traits.locale_text: « Selon moi, cette issue à la situation est {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117Traitor}la plus rationnelle{/d} de toutes. » {n}Les lentilles oculaires d'Exalt-117 restent fixes, et son visage augmenté ne laisse transparaître aucun sentiment.{/n} « Le sujet Juvenna von Valancius se voit assigner le plus haut statut. »

languages.text: «Según mi evaluación, esta sañida de la situación es {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117Traitor}eminentemente racional{/d}». {n}Exaltado-117 no mueve sus lentes oculares, y su rostro aumentado no expresa absolutamente nada.{/n} «Se ha asignado el máximo estatus a la sujeto Juvenna von Valancius».
languages.original_text: "I assess this route out of this situation as {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117Traitor}the most rational{/d}." {n}Exalt-117's ocular lenses remain fixed, and his augmented face expresses nothing.{/n} "Subject Juvenna von Valancius has been assigned the highest status."

traits.locale_text: «Según mi evaluación, esta sañida de la situación es {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117Traitor}eminentemente racional{/d}». {n}Exaltado-117 no mueve sus lentes oculares, y su rostro aumentado no expresa absolutamente nada.{/n} «Se ha asignado el máximo estatus a la sujeto Juvenna von Valancius».

languages.text: "Bu durumdan çıkış için bu yolu {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117Traitor}en rasyonel seçenek{/d} olarak değerlendiriyorum." {n}Yüce-117'nin oküler mercekleri sabit kalıyor, ogmentli yüzü de hiçbir şey ifade sunmuyor.{/n} "Juvenna von Valancius öznesine en yüksek statü atanmıştır."
languages.original_text: "I assess this route out of this situation as {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117Traitor}the most rational{/d}." {n}Exalt-117's ocular lenses remain fixed, and his augmented face expresses nothing.{/n} "Subject Juvenna von Valancius has been assigned the highest status."

traits.locale_text: "Bu durumdan çıkış için bu yolu {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117Traitor}en rasyonel seçenek{/d} olarak değerlendiriyorum." {n}Yüce-117'nin oküler mercekleri sabit kalıyor, ogmentli yüzü de hiçbir şey ifade sunmuyor.{/n} "Juvenna von Valancius öznesine en yüksek statü atanmıştır."

languages.text: "Ich bewerte diesen Ausweg aus dieser Situation als {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117Traitor}ausgesprochen rational{/d}." {n}Die Okularlinsen von Exalt-117 bleiben starr und sein augmentiertes Gesicht zeigt keine Regung.{/n} "Subjekt Juvenna von Valancius wurde der höchste Status gewährt."
languages.original_text: "I assess this route out of this situation as {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117Traitor}the most rational{/d}." {n}Exalt-117's ocular lenses remain fixed, and his augmented face expresses nothing.{/n} "Subject Juvenna von Valancius has been assigned the highest status."

traits.locale_text: "Ich bewerte diesen Ausweg aus dieser Situation als {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117Traitor}ausgesprochen rational{/d}." {n}Die Okularlinsen von Exalt-117 bleiben starr und sein augmentiertes Gesicht zeigt keine Regung.{/n} "Subjekt Juvenna von Valancius wurde der höchste Status gewährt."

languages.text: 「この状況から脱する最良の道は、{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117Traitor}最も合理的なもの{/d}であると判断した。」{n}エクセルント117の視覚レンズは固定され、強化された顔は何も表さない。{/n}「対象ユベナ・フォン・ヴァランキウスは最高位に格付けされた。」
languages.original_text: "I assess this route out of this situation as {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117Traitor}the most rational{/d}." {n}Exalt-117's ocular lenses remain fixed, and his augmented face expresses nothing.{/n} "Subject Juvenna von Valancius has been assigned the highest status."
